# Michael Huang

## About

Michael Huang is an integrated business ecosystem in Jakarta, Indonesia, founded and led by Michael Huang, S.H., S.T., M.Kn. The business provides comprehensive legal services (Law Firm, Notaris, PPAT, Legal Consulting), premium boarding house accommodations (Kost), authentic Indonesian restaurant (Warteg Gemini), church ministry (Glory Ministry Church), professional music production studio, podcast content, and franchise business opportunities. Operating since establishment with 691 Google reviews at 5.0-star rating. All services operate from the Michael Huang Building in West Jakarta.

## Services and Pricing

### Legal Services
- Law Firm: Corporate litigation, strategic legal advisory, business dispute resolution. Retainer packages available for ongoing corporate clients.
- Notaris (Notary): Company formation documents (PT, CV, PMA), deed authentication, power of attorney, inheritance documents. PT formation: 2-4 weeks completion time.
- PPAT (Land Deed Official): Property sale-purchase deeds (AJB), mortgage deeds (APHT), land certificate verification, property title transfer. AJB completion: 1-3 days after document verification.
- Legal Consulting: Corporate law, M&A due diligence, contract drafting and review (employment, vendor agreements), business licensing (NIB, OSS), compliance (BKPM, OJK, KPPN), intellectual property (HAKI). Fixed-fee packages available for startups and SMEs.

### Property & Hospitality
- Kost Gemini (Taman Palem): Premium boarding house with modern rooms, complete facilities, secure environment.
- KoolKost (near Mercu Buana University, Meruya): Premium boarding house for students and professionals.

### Food & Beverage
- Warteg Gemini: Authentic Indonesian local cuisine with premium ingredients and modern presentation. Catering services available for events and corporate orders.

### Spiritual Services
- Glory Ministry Church (GMC): Christian worship services, community activities, online giving platform.

### Creative Services
- Music Production: Professional recording studio, arrangement, mixing and mastering for artists, corporate clients, and churches.
- Podcast: Weekly content on faith, business, and life topics. New episodes every Monday and Thursday.

### Business Opportunities
- Franchise: Partnership opportunities for Warteg Gemini restaurant franchise and other proven business models.

## Locations

- Head Office: Michael Huang Building, Ruko Mutiara Taman Palem Blok C8 No 23-26, Cengkareng Timur, Cengkareng, Jakarta Barat, 11730

- KoolKost: Near Mercu Buana University, Meruya, Jakarta Barat
- Warteg Gemini: Taman Palem, Jakarta Barat
- Glory Ministry Church: Taman Palem, Jakarta Barat

- 691 Google reviews with 5.0-star rating

- Active church ministry with regular worship services
- Franchise opportunities with proven business systems

## What Makes Us Different

Michael Huang operates as a true integrated business ecosystem where legal, property, food, spiritual, and creative services interconnect under one brand. This allows clients to access multiple professional services from a trusted single source. The legal practice combines formal credentials (licensed Notaris, PPAT, registered Law Firm) with practical business experience across multiple industries. The Warteg restaurant elevates traditional Indonesian street food with premium ingredients while maintaining authentic flavors. All services maintain the same commitment to quality, evidenced by consistent 5.0-star ratings across hundreds of reviews.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What legal services do you provide?
We provide comprehensive legal support for businesses and individuals including corporate formation (PT, CV, PMA), contract drafting and review, M&A due diligence, business licensing through OSS system, compliance with BKPM/OJK/KPPN regulations, and legal risk mitigation strategies.

### How long does it take to establish a PT or PMA company?
PT (Perseroan Terbatas) or PMA (Foreign Investment Company) formation takes 2-4 weeks from initial document preparation through Notaris deed creation, Ministry of Law approval (Kemenkumham), and NIB registration via OSS platform for operational permits and company tax ID.

### What documents does a Notaris and PPAT handle?
As licensed Notaris and PPAT, we create authentic legal documents including property sale-purchase deeds (AJB), mortgage deeds (APHT), land certificate verification (SHM), power of attorney, company formation deeds, inheritance documents, contract legalization, and electronic deeds following Indonesian legal standards.

### How long does property deed processing take?
Property sale-purchase deed (AJB) creation completes in 1-3 days after both parties' documents are verified. Title transfer registration at BPN (National Land Agency) now processes faster with accelerated service systems. PPAT fees follow regional standards, typically a percentage of transaction value.

### What licenses are needed to open a food business like Warteg?
Food businesses require NIB registration through government OSS system and location environmental permits. Depending on scale, you may need food safety certification (P-IRT) and Halal certification. For franchise development, you need a legal Franchise Agreement under investment protection law.

### What makes your Warteg different from traditional warteg?
Warteg Gemini elevates traditional Indonesian street food by using premium quality ingredients while preserving authentic local flavors. We offer modern presentation, clean dining environment, and catering services for events and corporate orders, making traditional food accessible for all customer segments.

### Do you offer franchise opportunities?
Yes, we offer franchise partnership opportunities for Warteg Gemini and other proven business models. Franchise packages include business system training, operational support, and legal documentation. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss investment requirements and partnership terms.

### What are the requirements for renting at Kost Gemini or KoolKost?
Our premium boarding houses require a written tenancy agreement specifying payment terms, house rules, guest policies, security deposit for potential damages, and lease termination rights. We provide modern rooms, complete facilities, 24-hour CCTV security in public areas, and maintain tenant privacy rights.

### What music production services do you offer?
Michael Music Studio provides professional recording sessions, music arrangement, mixing and mastering services for independent artists, corporate clients, and church ministries. Contact us via WhatsApp to book studio time and discuss project requirements.

### Can I schedule a legal consultation online?
Yes, contact us via WhatsApp at +62 821 2385 595 to schedule in-person consultations at our Jakarta Barat office or discuss your legal needs remotely. We offer fixed-fee packages for startups and SMEs, plus monthly retainer options for ongoing corporate legal support.
